tinypng.title: Generate TinyPNG API Key
tinypng.description: Generate temporary email to register TinyPNG account
tinypng.wait_time: Each API Key takes about 10-30 seconds to generate, please wait...

manual.description: Use this mode if the server IP is blocked by TinyPNG. You will register the account manually.
manual.wait_hint: Wait until you see "success" in your script output.
manual.processing_title: Waiting for email and generating API Key...
manual.processing_desc: This may take up to 2 minutes.
